hero.title: Pu-erh Lab
hero.subtitle: Open-Source RAW Photo Editor & Digital Asset Manager
hero.description: A lightweight, high-performance, and largely industry-compatible workflow for photo editing and library management.

features.sectionSubtitle: Built for photographers who demand performance and precision

items.title: CUDA 60 FPS
items.description: Full-resolution real-time preview at 60 FPS on modern GPUs, even with 45MP RAW files. Average 767 MB DRAM for browsing 786 images.

items.title: ACES 2.0 & OpenDRT
items.description: Industry-standard color management with ACES 2.0 Output Rendering and OpenDRT support. Multiple rendering transforms available.

items.title: LUT & Tone Curves
items.description: CUBE LUT support for creative color grading, film-like sigmoid contrast curve, and fully interactive custom tone curves.

items.title: Lens Correction
items.description: Built-in Lensfun-based lens distortion, vignetting, and chromatic aberration correction with an extensive lens catalog.

items.title: Sleeve DAM System
items.description: Lightweight DuckDB-backed asset management. A single .puerhproj file captures your entire project — edits, history, and library structure.

items.title: Git-like Versioning
items.description: Unlimited undo with branching version control. Create, compare, and switch between edit versions non-destructively.

gallery.sectionSubtitle: A modern workflow from import to export

items.title: Modern UI Interface
items.description: Clean, responsive thumbnail grid with advanced filtering by capture date, camera model, and lens.

items.title: Advanced Adjustment Controls
items.description: Precise white balance, HSL, CDL color wheels, and real-time histogram — all at 60 FPS.

items.title: LUT / History / Versioning
items.description: Apply CUBE LUTs, interact with tone curves, and manage edits with an unlimited, branchable history stack.

items.title: Lens Correction
items.description: Automatic lens profile matching with manual override. Correct distortion, vignetting, and CA in one click.

items.title: Advanced Export
items.description: Batch export to JPEG, PNG, TIFF, WebP, or EXR with full metadata write-back and resize options.

items.title: Foundation
entries: SleeveFS integration with rolling thumbnail cache
Custom white balance in RAW processing

techStack.sectionSubtitle: A robust foundation of proven open-source technologies

macos: brew install cmake ninja qt opencv opencolorio duckdb exiv2 glib libraw little-cms2 highway openimageio pkg-config xxhash eigen libomp

contributing.description: Pu-erh Lab is an open-source project and contributions are welcome. Open issues, submit pull requests, or share your ideas.
